meeting.track_notes: Greyville Turf: 2800m triangular-shaped circuit; all races clockwise round turn with 430m run-in. Poly: 2000m track inside the turf circuit; all races clockwise round turn with 440m run-in. False rail: 2m.
meeting.draw_bias_notes: DRAW: Turf: Low-number draws preferable, especially 1400m and 1600m. Poly: Low-number draws slightly preferred 1400m and 1600m.

SOMMERSTERN has solid form and could follow up

races.preview: Hollywoodbets Durban July Day has arrived - Bet with TAB, MASSIVE POOLS are expected, and Jackpot 1 starts in Race 1. SOMMERSTERN has solid form and could follow up on his fluent local debut win but tries the Polytrack from a wide gate. MAGMA MAGIC has matured and after reeling off two in a row could stretch them out again even if having not yet won on the surface. TOWN CRIER confirmed support with a good win and has much in his favour again. PLACE OF PRACTICE has room for improvement and is a dark horse. IBUTHO and UNITED FRONT should be there. If reserve HOODIA gets in, watch out

races.preview: Who will win the RIOM spectacle? And RIOM is expected for the Mega Quartet Pool - get on! STAR MAJOR and WISH LIST are sensational athletes that have proven themselves on the big stage. NOTE TO SELF is another capable three-year-old but needs things to go his way. It could be the reboot of the Cape Derby where WISH LIST beat NOTE TO SELF but STAR MAJOR, who was a few lengths back, is now the finished product and must be a big player. It doesn't end there. LEGAL COUNSEL and GLADATORIAN are packed with class and there is a big weight spread. Take your pick, many can get into the money!

races.preview: Plenty fillies and mares with good ability. SERENGETTI SUN is lightly raced but retains ability She ran well from a wide draw and has now drawn well on her Poly debut. High- veld-based fillies ANCHORAGE and CAPTAIN SELVIE bring solid form into the region and could fight it out if taking to the surface. But the horse to catch with a light weight again may be LOCK AND KEY who came back to best showing amazing speed to beat males last time. WARM RECEPTION has shown high class potential back home and must be respected MISS WORLD is talented but has a wide gate. More in it.

She has the pace to suit the poly. SCARLET STARLET can only improve after dropping in distance last time. She must have more to come. It could get close between DECEMBER DAWN and fast-finishing THOUGHT CONTROL on their last meeting but both have to negotiate wide draws SIBERIAN WINTER won a nice race last time but POURSOMESUGARONME should be right on top of her.
